title: adenia acuminata
intro: Adenia acuminata, also known as the red passion plant, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenia acuminata include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and roots can be used to make a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to apply to affected areas.
